title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXXVIII. Relics.
content:
The barber shaved the mason,
            As I suppose
            Cut off his nose,
        And popp'd it in a basin.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXXVIII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
